mapper.select:
SELECT p.product_no, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.base_rate, p.max_rate, p.min_period_month, p.max_period_month, p.min_amount, p.max_amount, p.target_large, p.target_detail, p.description, p.product_tendency,
( SELECT LISTAGG(pc.currency_code, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY pc.currency_code) FROM product_currencies pc WHERE pc.product_no = p.product_no ) AS currency_codes,
( SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.product_no = p.product_no ) AS avg_rating,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.product_no = p.product_no ) AS review_count
FROM products p WHERE p.active = 'Y' AND p.product_type LIKE '외화%' ORDER BY p.max_rate DESC NULLS LAST, p.product_no DESC

SELECT p.product_no, p.active, p.product_name, p.product_type, p.base_rate, p.max_rate, p.min_period_month, p.max_period_month, p.min_amount, p.max_amount, p.target_large, p.target_detail, p.description, p.interest_payment_type, p.product_tendency, p.status, p.product_start_dt, p.product_end_dt,
( SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.product_no = p.product_no ) AS avg_rating,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_reviews r WHERE r.product_no = p.product_no ) AS review_count
FROM products p WHERE p.product_no = #{productNo}
SELECT product_currency_no, product_no, currency_code, currency_name FROM product_currencies WHERE product_no = #{productNo} ORDER BY currency_code
SELECT rate_no, product_no, period_month, interest_rate FROM product_rates WHERE product_no = #{productNo} ORDER BY period_month
SELECT preferential_rate_no, product_no, preferential_condition, preferential_rate FROM product_preferential_rates WHERE product_no = #{productNo} ORDER BY preferential_rate_no

SELECT TO_CHAR(pt.terms_no) AS terms_code, pt.product_no, ptv.terms_title, tt.type_name AS terms_type, pt.required_yn, ptv.pdf_path, ptv.terms_text, pt.use_yn FROM product_terms pt JOIN product_term_versions ptv ON pt.terms_no = ptv.terms_no LEFT JOIN terms_types tt ON pt.type_no = tt.type_no WHERE pt.product_no = #{productNo} AND pt.use_yn = 'Y' AND ptv.is_current = 'Y' AND ptv.effective_dt <= SYSDATE AND (ptv.expired_dt IS NULL OR ptv.expired_dt > SYSDATE) ORDER BY pt.required_yn DESC, pt.terms_no

SELECT r.review_no, r.user_no, r.product_no, u.name_ko AS user_name, r.review_text, r.rating, r.created_dt, r.updated_dt FROM product_reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_no = u.user_no WHERE r.product_no = #{productNo} ORDER BY r.created_dt DESC
